title: Plan Change
content: As a subscriber, I want to change my current mobile plan so that I can get better benefits. The user must call POST /auth/login to authenticate, use GET /plans to view current and recommended plans, POST /plans/switch to select a new plan, then POST /payments/initiate to start payment. The user must verify payment using POST /payments/verify-otp, and finally POST /plans/activate to activate the selected plan.
